prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年西安电子科技大学在上海市最低录取位次整体呈后移趋势，2025年基准位次约14000名左右；2026年招生计划较2025年略有扩招，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜排名约第40-50名，属于电子信息领域强校；学校在电子信息领域声誉良好，抖音热度中等偏上，报考关注度持续升温；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A-等，均为当前热门学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息类、计算机类专业社会热度持续高热，上海市2026年考生总数预计略有增加，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招、电子信息类专业持续高热及本省考生增加等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上继续后移，预测最低位次约14500名，区间14200–14800名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 通信工程（西安）
- 电子信息工程（西安）
- 计算机科学与技术（西安）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 网络空间安全（西安）
- 人工智能（西安）
- 微电子科学与工程（西安）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 自动化（西安）
- 数学与应用数学（西安）
- 管理科学与工程类（西安）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内（14200–14800名）建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<14200名）可重点冲刺通信工程、电子信息工程等A+王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>14800名）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入学校后再通过转专业等方式调整。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission ranking of Xidian University in Shanghai has shown an overall backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 14,000. In 2026, the enrollment plan has slightly expanded compared to 2025, leading to a slight increase in competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 40-50 in the Soft Science main ranking. It is a strong institution in the field of electronic information. The university has a good reputation in electronic information, with moderate to high popularity on Douyin, and increasing attention for applications. Its disciplines include Information and Communication Engineering (A+), Electronic Science and Technology (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), and Cyberspace Security (A-), all of which are currently popular fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of electronic information and computer majors remains high. The total number of examinees in Shanghai in 2026 is expected to increase slightly, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, the continued high popularity of electronic information majors, and the increase in local examinees, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move backward from 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14,500, with a range of 14,200 to 14,800.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Communication Engineering (Xi'an)
- Electronic Information Engineering (Xi'an)
- Computer Science and Technology (Xi'an).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Cyberspace Security (Xi'an)
- Artificial Intelligence (Xi'an)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Xi'an).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation (Xi'an)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Xi'an)
- Management Science and Engineering (Xi'an).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (14,200–14,800), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 flagship majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<14,200), you can focus on reaching for A+ flagship majors such as Communication Engineering and Electronic Information Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>14,800), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 3 majors, and then adjust through major transfer after entering the university.
